title: bigelowia squarrosa
intro: Bigelowia squarrosa, also known as the squarrose bigelowia or Bigelow's squarrose plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. Bigelowia squarrosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
